SEARCH
Package ru.tehkode.permissions

Interface PermissionsData

All Known Subinterfaces:
PermissionsGroupData, PermissionsUserData
public interface PermissionsData
Common read/write contract for permission entity data (users and groups).

Implementations represent a single user or group and expose world-scoped permissions, options, and parent-group inheritance. Changes are held in memory until save() is called, or may be written immediately depending on backend persistence settings.

See Also:
  • PermissionsUserData
  • PermissionsGroupData

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    String
    getIdentifier()
    Returns the current identifier of this entity.
    String
    getOption(String option, String worldName)
    Returns the value of a named option in the specified world.
    Map<String,String>
    getOptions(String worldName)
    Returns all options defined for this entity in the specified world.
    Map<String,Map<String,String>>
    getOptionsMap()
    Returns all options for this entity, keyed by world name.
    List<String>
    getParents(String worldName)
    Returns the parent groups of this user or group in the specified world.
    Map<String,List<String>>
    getParentsMap()
    Returns parent group mappings for all worlds.
    List<String>
    getPermissions(String worldName)
    Returns all permission nodes assigned to this entity in the specified world.
    Map<String,List<String>>
    getPermissionsMap()
    Returns all permission nodes for this entity, keyed by world name.
    Set<String>
    getWorlds()
    Returns the set of worlds in which this entity has permissions or options defined.
    boolean
    isVirtual()
    Returns whether this entity exists only in server memory and has not been persisted.
    void
    load()
    Preloads entity data from the backing storage into this handle.
    void
    remove()
    Removes this entity and all associated data from the backend.
    void
    save()
    Persists pending changes for this entity to the backend.
    void
    setOption(String option, String value, String world)
    Sets a named option value in the specified world.
    void
    setParents(List<String> parents, String worldName)
    Sets the parent groups of this user or group in the specified world.
    void
    setPermissions(List<String> permissions, String worldName)
    Replaces all permission nodes for this entity in the specified world.

  • Method Details

    • load

      void load()
      Preloads entity data from the backing storage into this handle.

      Subsequent getter calls reflect the loaded state. Implementations may call this lazily on first access.

    • getIdentifier

      String getIdentifier()
      Returns the current identifier of this entity.
      Returns:
      user or group identifier; never null for persisted entities

    • getPermissions

      List<String> getPermissions(String worldName)
      Returns all permission nodes assigned to this entity in the specified world.
      Parameters:
      worldName - world name, or null for the global (common) context
      Returns:
      list of permission strings; never null

    • setPermissions

      void setPermissions(List<String> permissions, String worldName)
      Replaces all permission nodes for this entity in the specified world.
      Parameters:
      permissions - new permission list; may be empty but not null
      worldName - world name, or null for the global (common) context

    • getPermissionsMap

      Map<String,List<String>> getPermissionsMap()
      Returns all permission nodes for this entity, keyed by world name.
      Returns:
      map from world name to permission lists; never null

    • getWorlds

      Set<String> getWorlds()
      Returns the set of worlds in which this entity has permissions or options defined.
      Returns:
      set of world names; never null

    • getOption

      String getOption(String option, String worldName)
      Returns the value of a named option in the specified world.
      Parameters:
      option - option key (for example "prefix" or "suffix")
      worldName - world name, or null for the global (common) context
      Returns:
      option value, or null if the option is not defined in that world

    • setOption

      void setOption(String option, String value, String world)
      Sets a named option value in the specified world.
      Parameters:
      option - option key
      value - option value; may be null to clear the option
      world - world name, or null for the global (common) context

    • getOptions

      Map<String,String> getOptions(String worldName)
      Returns all options defined for this entity in the specified world.
      Parameters:
      worldName - world name, or null for the global (common) context
      Returns:
      map from option key to value; never null

    • getOptionsMap

      Map<String,Map<String,String>> getOptionsMap()
      Returns all options for this entity, keyed by world name.
      Returns:
      map from world name to option maps; never null

    • getParents

      List<String> getParents(String worldName)
      Returns the parent groups of this user or group in the specified world.
      Parameters:
      worldName - world name, or null for the global (common) context
      Returns:
      unmodifiable list of parent group names; never null

    • setParents

      void setParents(List<String> parents, String worldName)
      Sets the parent groups of this user or group in the specified world.
      Parameters:
      parents - new list of parent group names; may be empty but not null
      worldName - world name, or null for the global (common) context

    • isVirtual

      boolean isVirtual()
      Returns whether this entity exists only in server memory and has not been persisted.
      Returns:
      true if the entity is virtual (not yet saved to the backend)

    • save

      void save()
      Persists pending changes for this entity to the backend.

    • remove

      void remove()
      Removes this entity and all associated data from the backend.

    • getParentsMap

      Map<String,List<String>> getParentsMap()
      Returns parent group mappings for all worlds.
      Returns:
      map from world name to parent group lists; never null
